mapper.sql: r.id, r.user_id AS userId, r.rec_type AS recType, r.target_id AS targetId, r.target_name AS targetName, r.algorithm_type AS algorithmType, r.score, r.reason, r.created_at AS createdAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recommendation_record ( user_id, rec_type, target_id, target_name, algorithm_type, score, reason ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{recType}, #{targetId}, #{targetName}, #{algorithmType}, #{score}, #{reason} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM recommendation_record r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id

SELECT id, exercise_name AS exerciseName, category, body_part AS bodyPart, difficulty, equipment, calories_per_hour AS caloriesPerHour, default_sets AS defaultSets, default_reps AS defaultReps, duration_min AS durationMin, description, caution, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM fit_exercise WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT id, food_name AS foodName, category, calories_per_100g AS caloriesPer100g, protein_per_100g AS proteinPer100g, fat_per_100g AS fatPer100g, carb_per_100g AS carbPer100g, suitable_goal AS suitableGoal, suitable_time AS suitableTime, description, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM fit_food WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, p.plan_type AS planType, p.plan_name AS planName, p.cycle_type AS cycleType, p.start_date AS startDate, p.end_date AS endDate, p.target_goal AS targetGoal, p.source_type AS sourceType, p.status, p.notes, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM fitness_plan p WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(p.status, '')) IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS', '进行中', '待执行') THEN 0 WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(p.status, '')) IN ('DONE', 'COMPLETED', '已完成') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, p.updated_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT e.category FROM user_workout_record r LEFT JOIN fit_exercise e ON r.exercise_id = e.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND e.category IS NOT NULL AND e.category != '' ORDER BY r.workout_date DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT e.body_part FROM user_workout_record r LEFT JOIN fit_exercise e ON r.exercise_id = e.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND e.body_part IS NOT NULL AND e.body_part != '' ORDER BY r.workout_date DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT meal_type FROM user_diet_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND meal_type IS NOT NULL AND meal_type != '' ORDER BY diet_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 5
